note: Strategy taxonomy for the Content Orchestrator. Each theme maps a demand signal to a generator, channel, approval gate, and success metric. The orchestrator never publishes and never writes Woo; it parks every item at the listed gate. Cadence_days = how often the theme is due; per_run = candidates pulled when due.

gates.campaign: campaign-orchestration-contract.md — draft → owner preview → approved → active
gates.content: content-lifecycle-contract.md — demand → brief → draft → QA → owner approve → publish
gates.owner: direct owner decision required before any asset is built (money/giveaway/price)

themes.label: Fast-Selling / Bestsellers
themes.intent: social proof + restock urgency drives repeat conversion on proven winners

themes.label: Clearance / Last-Chance
themes.intent: move slow/aging stock with honest, Woo-backed price urgency
themes.guard: Requires real Woo sale prices enabled by owner. Never fabricate discounts or urgency.

themes.label: New Arrivals
themes.intent: freshness + first-mover curiosity on newly listed SKUs

themes.label: Free Giveaway / Contest
themes.intent: follower growth + UGC + email capture via gated giveaway
themes.guard: Owner defines prize, rules, dates, and winner-selection. No automated prize commitments.

themes.label: Customer Reviews / Testimonials
themes.intent: real verified reviews build trust at the moment of decision
themes.guard: Use only real Judge.me-verified reviews. No fabricated testimonials.

themes.label: Influencer / Persona Recommendation
themes.intent: creator/persona voice gives relatable proof and routine context
themes.guard: Persona frames must follow creative-persona-standard.md: real product visible, one face per reel. TikTok gated on app approval.

themes.label: Ingredient Education
themes.intent: ingredient literacy routes shoppers to the right SKU and wins AEO/GEO queries

themes.label: Trending on Web (TikTok / Search / FB / IG)
themes.intent: ride live demand spikes while intent is hot; capture striking-distance queries

themes.label: Latest Innovation / Hero Formulas
themes.intent: position Emart as the place that carries what is new and advanced

themes.label: Doctor / Dermatologist-Style Recommendation
themes.intent: expert-tone authority for concern-led shoppers (acne, pigmentation, barrier)
themes.guard: Persona dr-rumana. No medical claims or 'clinically proven' without source; follow GMC healthcare-claim rules.

themes.label: Cosmetics / Skincare Hero Items
themes.intent: broad catalog discovery across skincare cosmetics range

themes.label: Color Cosmetics / Makeup
themes.intent: shade-led visual desire for makeup category; high-emotion creative
themes.guard: Avoid identity/belief shade-name framing flagged by GMC (per D6).
